payload.rationale: eval-trigger.txt reports sprint 3 but sprint-fence.json expected sprint 2 — possible multi-sprint drift detected
run-state.json has needs_human=true; human action is required before the orchestrator may route another agent

payload.detail: run-state.json says last_successful_sprint=2 but eval-result-2.md is missing or does not contain SPRINT PASS
eval-result-1.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 1
eval-result-2.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 2

last_failure_reason: [run_state_unsupported] Sprint 2: run-state.json says last_successful_sprint=2 but eval-result-2.md is missing or does not contain SPRINT PASS; [evaluator_skipped] Sprint 1: eval-result-1.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 1; [evaluator_skipped] Sprint 2: eval-result-2.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 2

payload.rationale: sprint-history audit found state that contradicts eval-result files: [run_state_unsupported] Sprint 2: run-state.json says last_successful_sprint=2 but eval-result-2.md is missing or does not contain SPRINT PASS; [evaluator_skipped] Sprint 1: eval-result-1.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 1; [evaluator_skipped] Sprint 2: eval-result-2.md is missing but run-state.json claims Sprint 2 already succeeded; Evaluator never ran for Sprint 2
run-state.json has needs_human=true; human action is required before the orchestrator may route another agent
